name: Oreos
recipeInstructions:
Combine the cake mix ingredients through cocoa and blend well until you can shape dough into balls. Let stand for 20 minutes. Form the dough into half-inch balls, two inches apart on a greased cookie sheet. Flatten each with the smooth bottom of a drinking glass that has been greased once and dipped into Nestles Quik powder with each cookie. Bake at 400°F for 8 minutes. Remove cookies immediately and flatten with the back of a spatula. Let cool for 20 minutes.
For the Oreo Cookie Filling, soften gelatin in cold water; place in a heatproof cup in a pan of hot water and allow to completely dissolve. Meanwhile, beat Crisco until light and fluffy, adding sugar and vanilla. Beat well for about ten minutes. Cool the gelatin mixture and beat into the filling. The gelatin is used only to keep the filling in place when spread between cookies. Use about 1 tablespoon of filling.
